title: Healthy Brain Network (HBN) EEG - Release 10
description: The Healthy Brain Network (HBN) EEG Release 10 dataset comprises high-resolution electroencephalogram recordings from 533 children and adolescents (ages 5-21 years) performing six distinct cognitive and perceptual tasks, including resting state, passive viewing tasks (surround suppression, movie watching), and active tasks (contrast change detection, sequence learning, symbol search). The dataset includes behavioral responses, hierarchical event descriptors for systematic meta-analysis, and psychopathology measures derived from the Child Behavior Checklist, providing a comprehensive resource for understanding neural correlates of development and mental health in youth. This is Release 10 of the HBN-EEG dataset series.
methods_description: EEG data were collected during six tasks: three passive tasks (resting state with eyes open/closed, surround suppression with flashing peripheral disks, and movie watching) and three active tasks requiring participant responses (contrast change detection, sequence learning, and symbol search). Behavioral responses including reaction times and accuracy were recorded during task performance. Data quality control was performed to ensure data integrity, task event completeness, and preprocessing readiness.
